user_prompt: How do I bless the power fist for preparation?
prayer:
Approach the power fist with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to bless its mighty grasp.
Anoint the power fist's actuators and servos with sacred oils in preparation for war.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the power fist, commanding it to stir from slumber.
Cycle the preparation sequences through its disruption fields, chanting the Litany of Potence.
Verify the power fist's readiness with diagnostic canticles of unyielding fury.

user_prompt: Urgent krak grenade an emergency procedure needed
prayer:
In haste, grasp the krak grenade and invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon its core.
Initiate the emergency procedure by reciting the Rite of Explosive Purification.
Beseech the volatile Machine Spirit within the krak grenade to heed thy desperate call.
Stabilize the krak grenade's fuze mechanisms with sanctified glyphs of containment.
Deploy the krak grenade forth, praising the Machine God's judgement in thunderous release.

user_prompt: The eradication beamer needs a loading
prayer:
Present thyself before the eradication beamer, intoning the Canticle of Annihilation.
Commence the loading rite by feeding sanctified ammunition into its voracious maw.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the eradication beamer with oils of focusing purity.
Align the loading conduits whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for lethal precision.
Affirm the eradication beamer's charge through hymns of escalating radiance.

user_prompt: Prepare the Storm Eagle for reset
prayer:
Kneel before the Storm Eagle, invoking the Omnissiah's aerial dominion.
Initiate the reset protocols upon its thunderous frame with binary prayers.
Purge errant data-daemons from the Storm Eagle's cogitators, beseeching its Machine Spirit.
Realign the Storm Eagle's auspex arrays and thrusters in ritual harmony.
Conclude the reset with the Incantation of Renewed Flight, glorifying the Machine God.

user_prompt: Prepare the needle rifle for charging
prayer:
Grasp the needle rifle firmly, anointing its needle-chambers with sacred solvents.
Invoke the charging rite, channeling the Omnissiah's venomous ire into its coils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the needle rifle to imbue each monomolecular dart.
Cycle the charging capacitors whilst chanting the Litany of Penetrating Doom.
Test the needle rifle's lethal readiness with whispers of toxic benediction.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for long las a blessing
prayer:
Approach the long las with pious awe, offering incense to its lens sanctum.
Pour forth the blessing upon the long las, invoking the Omnissiah's searing gaze.
Anoint the long las's power cells and focusing crystals with unguents of light.
Commune with its Machine Spirit through the Canticle of Distant Judgement.
Seal the blessing with auspex scans, praising the long las's unerring purity.

user_prompt: The standard template construct requires a shutdown
prayer:
Stand vigilant before the standard template construct, intoning the Shutdown Doxology.
Initiate the shutdown sequence upon the standard template construct's sacred vaults.
Beseech its ancient Machine Spirit to slumber in the Omnissiah's embrace.
Sever data-flows from the standard template construct with rites of dormancy.
Seal the standard template construct in stasis, whispering litanies of preservation.

user_prompt: The power fist needs an emergency procedure
prayer:
In urgency, seize the power fist and recite the Emergency Rite of Restoration.
Purge warp-taint from the power fist's disruption fields, invoking Omnissian fury.
Reawaken the Machine Spirit of the power fist through electro-incantations.
Execute the emergency procedure by realigning its crushing servomotors.
Affirm the power fist's resurgence with canticles of indomitable might.

user_prompt: Bless the emergency bulkhead for cycling
prayer:
Confront the emergency bulkhead, beseeching the Omnissiah's impenetrable will.
Initiate the cycling mechanism with sanctified levers and binary hymns.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the emergency bulkhead to seal against the void.
Anoint its pistons during the cycling rite for swift and unyielding response.
Verify the emergency bulkhead's cycle with praises of fortified sanctity.

Present the las-cutter to the altar of activation, chanting the Initialization Canticle.
Invoke the Omnissiah to ignite the las-cutter's plasma heart.
Anoint its emitter coils with oils of incandescence for proper initialization.
Commune with the las-cutter's Machine Spirit, aligning its cutting frequencies.
Complete the initialization through diagnostic litanies of searing precision.
